items.title: The New China Maritime Code: key cargo issues for carriers
items.summary: On 1 May 2026, a comprehensively revised China Maritime Code (CMC) entered into force, replacing a framework that had remained largely unchanged for over three decades. Several amendments are likely to have practical implications for carriers, terminal operators and their insurers. This article high

items.title: Heroic Idun: What we can learn from the landmark ITLOS ruling
items.summary: Following the International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea's judgment in the M/T Heroic Idun case, Gard looks back on a dispute that truly tested the fundamental principles of international maritime law. The ruling offers important lessons – on freedom of navigation, crew welfare, and the value of
items.summary_zh: 國際海洋法法庭對M/T Heroic Idun案件的裁決提供了重要的教訓，涉及航行自由、船員福祉及其價值。這一裁決考驗了國際海事法的基本原則。

items.title: Beyond Specification: Bunker Claims Insights, Early 2026
items.summary: Between January and May 2026, Gard handled over 70 bunker-related claims - a 50% increase on the same period last year. Almost all involved fuel quality, and the pattern has sharpened since the Middle East conflict escalated in late February.
items.summary_zh: 在2026年1月至5月期間，Gard處理了超過70宗與燃料相關的索賠，較去年同期增加了50%。幾乎所有索賠均涉及燃料質量，自2月底中東衝突升級以來，這一趨勢更加明顯。

items.title: New biofouling regulations in Brazil
items.summary: Vessels above 24 meters must plan and record proactive biofouling management measures to document a ‘clean hull’ on entry into Brazilian waters, or undertake reactive in-water hull cleaning to achieve the same. While enforcement of associated sanctions has reportedly been deferred to 10 January 2028
items.summary_zh: 在巴西，長度超過24米的船舶進入巴西水域時，必須以「乾淨的船體」抵達，或進行水中清洗。類似的限制也適用於在國內海洋生物地理區域內運行的船舶。相關制裁的執行日期已被延遲。

items.title: China tightens verification of ships’ energy consumption data
items.summary: From 22 December 2022, ships trading to Chinese ports must record their energy consumption data in accordance with the requirements of their Ship Energy Efficiency Management Plan (SEEMP). Ships must also report the consumption data from their last voyage to the Chinese authorities prior to leaving
items.summary_zh: 自2022年12月22日起，前往中國港口的船舶必須根據其船舶能源效率管理計劃（SEEMP）記錄能源消耗數據。船舶在離開之前還必須向中國當局報告其最後一次航行的消耗數據。

items.title: Seafarers detained in Egypt for carrying prohibited items
items.summary: Our local correspondent in Egypt reports an increase in cases where seafarers have been detained for carrying prohibited items, such as drones and other “suspicious” electronic devices, in their luggage when embarking or disembarking ships in the country.
items.summary_zh: 埃及當地報導指出，海員因攜帶禁運物品（如無人機及其他“可疑”電子設備）而被拘留的案件有所增加，這些物品通常是在登船或下船時被發現的。

items.title: War in Ukraine – impact on maritime situation
items.summary: Despite ongoing peace talks between Ukraine and Russia, the security situation in the Black Sea remains unstable. All port calls in the region should be assessed on a case-by-case basis, consulting best management practices for guidance on threats and mitigating measures.
items.summary_zh: 儘管烏克蘭與俄羅斯之間正在進行和平談判，黑海的安全形勢仍然不穩定。該地區的所有港口進港應根據具體情況進行評估，並參考最佳管理實踐以指導威脅和減輕措施。

items.title: Updated guidance on pilot transfer arrangements
items.summary: The International Chamber of Shipping (ICS) and the International Maritime Pilots Association (IMPA) recently published an updated version of their ‘Shipping Industry Guidance on Pilot Transfer Arrangements’ in an effort to make pilot transfer arrangements safer.
items.summary_zh: 國際航運商會（ICS）和國際海事引航員協會（IMPA）最近發布了更新版的《航運業引航轉移安排指導》，旨在提高引航轉移安排的安全性。

items.title: The International Group joins the Top Tier project on container losses
items.summary: A series of incidents with exceptional container losses occurred during the winter season 2020-2021. The TopTier project was put in place by the industry to find ways to avoid similar incidents in the future. Initial Results show that parametric rolling in following seas was especially hazardous.
items.summary_zh: 國際集團參與了針對集裝箱損失的TopTier專案。2020-2021冬季期間發生了一系列異常的集裝箱損失事件。該專案旨在尋找避免未來類似事件的方法，初步結果顯示，在隨浪航行時的參數性翻滾特別危險。

items.title: The purpose and limitations of Silver Nitrate Testing
items.summary: Sodium chloride found in seawater and as used to de-ice roadways is corrosive to steel. Silver nitrate testing of higher value steel cargos at the time of loading will detect chlorides present pre-shipment and can enable the Master to clause bills of lading as may be appropriate.
items.summary_zh: 銀氯化物測試可在裝船時檢測高價值鋼貨物中的氯化物，這些氯化物來自海水或用於除冰的氯化鈉，對鋼材具有腐蝕性。這項測試可以幫助船長在提單上進行適當的註明。

items.title: Verification of electronic statutory and class certificates
items.summary: Ships continue to experience instances of port state control interventions, and sometimes hefty fines, allegedly because the validity of their electronic statutory and class certificates cannot be verified during onboard inspections.
items.summary_zh: 船舶在港口國控制檢查中仍然面臨干預的情況，有時還會遭受高額罰款，原因是其電子法定和級別證書在船上檢查時無法驗證有效性。

items.title: Ghana withdraws Directive imposing fines on ships with unvaccinated personnel
items.summary: The Directive announcing that fines will be levied on vessels arriving in Ghanaian ports with crew or passengers not vaccinated against COVID-19 has now been withdrawn.
items.summary_zh: 加納已撤回對於抵達加納港口的船隻，若船員或乘客未接種COVID-19疫苗將處以罰款的指令。

items.title: Risky business: managing geopolitical security threats
items.summary: Due to pandemic restrictions, Gard held its 16th annual Charterers and Traders Geneva seminar as a webinar. The topic of global maritime security threats was addressed through role play with panellists representing a shipowner and a charterer. To kick-off, our guest speaker from Risk Intelligence, t

items.title: Handling of COVID-19 positive crew cases in China
items.summary: China’s zero-tolerance for COVID-19 and stringent border control continue to have serious consequences for crews and ships calling at the country’s ports - particularly if crew members have tested positive for COVID-19.
items.summary_zh: 中國對COVID-19採取零容忍政策及嚴格的邊境管控，對於進入該國港口的船員和船舶造成嚴重影響，尤其是當船員檢測結果為陽性時。

items.title: Be a handwash hero!
items.summary: Good hand hygiene is one of the most effective ways to avoid any type of infection through the spread of germs. Our hands touch numerous surfaces in the course of the day which exposes them to various germs. These germs can enter our bodies and spread serious or fatal infections.
items.summary_zh: 良好的手部衛生是避免通過細菌傳播感染的有效方法。手部接觸到多種表面，容易接觸到各種細菌，這些細菌可能進入人體並引發嚴重或致命的感染。
